examples: Bilbo hears the spiders speak because of the ring.
Bilbo was meant to find the Ring, in which case you also were meant to have it.
When Bilbo makes his farewell speech at the party, Dominic Monaghan read the speech for the reaction shots of the hobbits.
Martin Freeman, compact and affable, is a snug fit in the difficult role of Bilbo.
In all, it is three-quarters of an hour before the youthful Bilbo departs, adventure-bound.
